[DELAYED REPORT] AN ESTIMATED 10 PROPERTIES WERE IMPACTED WITH FLOODING DUE TO HEAVY RAIN RATES ALONG LINKER AND STALF ROADS IN THE TRI LAKES REGION OF WHITLEY COUNTY. IMPACTS INCLUDE WATER ACROSS THE ROADWAY, WASHED OUT CULVERTS, AND STANDING WATER IN HOUSES. TIME ESTIMATED BY RADAR.

5 LARGE POWER TRANSMISSION LINES WERE SNAPPED ON ROAD 82. AN OLD BARN ON ROAD 107 HAD THE ROOF BLOWN OFF AND THERE WERE A FEW TREE LIMBS BROKEN AT THAT LOCATION. THERE WERE ALSO SEVERAL REPORTS OF SPORADIC, MINOR DAMAGE TO TREES AND OUTDOOR FURNITURE FROM PAYNE TO MELROSE.
